  v_cve_2022_2856.summary = CASE WHEN v_cve_2022_2856.summary IS NULL OR trim(v_cve_2022_2856.summary) = '' THEN 'Chrome zero-day vulnerability rated High (CVSS); insufficient validation of untrusted input in Intents; actively exploited; could allow arbitrary code execution.' ELSE v_cve_2022_2856.summary END

  v_src.publisher = 'Google',
  v_src.published_on = date('2022-07-19')
ON MATCH SET
  v_src.title = CASE WHEN v_src.title IS NULL OR trim(v_src.title) = '' THEN 'Google Chrome stable channel update advisory for CVE-2022-2856' ELSE v_src.title END,
  v_src.publisher = CASE WHEN v_src.publisher IS NULL OR trim(v_src.publisher) = '' THEN 'Google' ELSE v_src.publisher END,
  v_src.published_on = CASE WHEN v_src.published_on IS NULL THEN date('2022-07-19') ELSE v_src.published_on END

ON CREATE SET
  v_cve_sup.quote = 'The bug, tracked as CVE-2022-2856 and rated as high on the CVSS, is associated with “insufficient validation of untrusted input in Intents”. Google credits Ashley Shen and Christian Resell (Google TAG) for reporting the zero-day bug, which could allow for arbitrary code execution, on July 19.'
ON MATCH SET
  v_cve_sup.quote = CASE WHEN v_cve_sup.quote IS NULL OR trim(v_cve_sup.quote) = '' THEN 'The bug, tracked as CVE-2022-2856 and rated as high on the CVSS, is associated with “insufficient validation of untrusted input in Intents”. Google credits Ashley Shen and Christian Resell (Google TAG) for reporting the zero-day bug, which could allow for arbitrary code execution, on July 19.' ELSE v_cve_sup.quote END;
